releaseNotes: [ Bug Fix ] Fixed the issue where you were able to scroll past users viewport
[ Bug Fix ] The messages page now takes up the full mobile screen
[ New Feature ] You can now see a preview of images in the team drive
[ New Feature ] Admins can now change roles of users
[ New Feature ] You can now delete conversations by swiping to the right then clicking delete
[ New Feature ] Admins UI has been re-done to fell better
